0.text: Ground-glass opacities in the right middle lobe

1.text: Ground-glass opacities in the posterobasal segments of the bilateral lower lobes

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the peripheral subpleural areas

3.text: Subcentimeter ground-glass nodule in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Atelectasis changes in the posterobasal segments of both lower lobes
